content: Jarvis OS is an AI automation platform. Send a command → AI understands → routes to the right agent → executes and replies.
Plans: Free (basic), Pro ₹999/month (all AI agents + WhatsApp), Premium ₹2999/month (everything + priority support + custom agents).
Payments via Razorpay — UPI, cards, net banking. Request a payment link to get one instantly.
Cancel anytime, no lock-in. Access continues until end of billing period.
Jarvis sends WhatsApp messages, follow-ups, campaigns, and payment links automatically via WhatsApp Business API.
Jarvis scrapes leads from Google Maps, LinkedIn, and Fiverr based on niche + location.
All data stored locally on your server. No sharing of leads, payments, or conversations with third parties.
Dev agents: Code Generator, Debugger, API Builder, Database, Firebase, Deployment, Version Control, Test Runner, Optimizer, Security Scanner.
Business agents: Payment, Subscription, Revenue, CRM, Marketing, SEO, Content, Analytics, Growth, Support.
7-day refund if not satisfied. Contact support within 7 days of purchase.
